prompt: Create an ultra-realistic square portrait of a young woman standing outdoors at night on a wet dark stone pavement, centered from mid-thigh upward. She has sleek long dark hair braided over one shoulder, wears a fitted black leather biker jacket with silver zippers and red plaid pants, with dangling silver earrings. Her hands are gently cupped in front of her chest, holding a small glowing neon yellow butterfly that emits warm radiant light onto her palms, jacket, and face. Behind her is a deep navy night-sky backdrop filled with bright neon doodles: exactly 2 large crescent moons, one cyan on the upper left and one pale yellow on the upper right; exactly 10 outlined neon stars in cyan, pink, and yellow scattered around; and exactly 8 small glowing dot lights in cyan, pink, and yellow. Use cinematic photorealism, shallow depth of field, glossy leather highlights, realistic skin and fabric texture, strong neon rim lighting, high contrast, soft bloom around all neon elements, and a dreamy magical atmosphere. Keep the composition symmetrical and clean, with the butterfly as the main light source and the woman looking down toward it. No text, no watermark, no extra people.
